steps.title: Identify the key signal—a conflict needing resolution
steps.content: The passage describes Dillard's struggle to reconcile the complicated juxtapositions of nature (early marvel at delicate fins, later wince at cruelty). This phrase signals that the next sentence must provide insight or closure.

steps.title: Apply the conclusive transition
steps.content:
Ultimately answers this signal by delivering the realization Dillard reaches: that nature's contradictions are inextricably linked. The other transitions fail—Moreover adds information, To that end suggests purpose, and Hence implies consequence rather than insight.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
